repo.description: Chinese text normalization for speech processing

terms.context_snippet: Search for "Text Normalization"(TN) on Google and Github, you can hardly find open-source projects that are "read-to-use" for text normalization tasks. Instead, you find a bunch of NLP toolkits or frameworks that *supports* TN functionality. There is quite some work between "sup…
